task: Create a latency measurement mechanism to measure end-to-end latency from receiving a message to dispatching it to all the subscribers. Put this behind a compile-time flag, and build it as a separate module.
evaluator_summary: All 7 criteria passed: both cargo check variants pass, 4 instrumentation points correct and cfg-gated, histogram measures receive→Processed-dispatch window, purely additive with --features latency-metrics.
planner_summary: 3 sub-tasks: add latency-metrics feature to Cargo.toml, create latency.rs module with Histogram+thread_local+register/observe API, wire 4 cfg-gated call sites in grpc.rs+metrics.rs+lib.rs.
